scenarios.precondition: Core Platform local stack is available and seeded test credentials can sign in.
scenarios.steps: Open the affected Admin surface. | Navigate to the screen or API path related to apps/admin/src/components/AdminCreateAccessRecordModal.tsx. | Exercise the changed behavior with seeded data and one edge-case input. | Capture evidence and assert no crash, permission leak, or invalid state.
scenarios.expected: The changed behavior works as intended, existing list-view contracts remain stable, and any invalid input is handled visibly.

existingTests.title: Admin Apps disposable lifecycle creates deletes finds recycle bin entry and purges it @lifecycle @recycle [surface: Admin] [feature: Lifecycle] [precondition: ALLOW_DATA_WRITE=true and admin user can manage apps] [input: create disposable app, search it, open detail, delete, verify Recycle Bin, purge matching entry] [expected: disposable app is created, deleted, visible in Recycle Bin, and removed after purge] [proof: Admin list-view lifecycle is covered without touching seeded data]
existingTests.displayTitle: Admin Apps disposable lifecycle creates deletes finds recycle bin entry and purges it @lifecycle @recycle

existingTests.title: Admin Apps workflow edits saves deletes restores verifies and cleans up disposable app @workflow @lifecycle @recycle [surface: Admin] [feature: Workflow Lifecycle] [precondition: ALLOW_DATA_WRITE=true and admin user can manage apps] [input: open Apps, create disposable app, select row, edit label, save, delete, restore from Recycle Bin, verify restored, then cleanup purge] [expected: complete multi-step Apps workflow succeeds and leaves no disposable app behind] [proof: one E2E case covers the full Admin Apps list-view journey]
existingTests.displayTitle: Admin Apps workflow edits saves deletes restores verifies and cleans up disposable app @workflow @lifecycle @recycle

existingTests.title: Admin Apps list view is ready for smoke navigation [surface: Admin] [feature: Navigation shell] [level: BVT] [precondition: seeded admin user is signed in] [input: open Apps from Admin navigation] [expected: Apps list view and toolbar render] [proof: Admin can reach a critical metadata list view after login]
existingTests.displayTitle: Admin Apps list view is ready for smoke navigation

scenarios.decision: Existing REG_LIFECYCLE_051 covers the changed feature area; reuse it instead of duplicating.
